zh.lifeSummary: 當Gentleman John Fitz Roger於1335年2月出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親Sir Aaron John FitzRoger60歲，母親Sybill Dacerra59歲。他於1370年與Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年2月24日在英國倫敦享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gentleman John Fitz Roger于1335年2月出生在英国英格兰肯特时，他的父亲Sir Aaron John FitzRoger60岁，母亲Sybill Dacerra59岁。他于1370年与Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年2月24日在英国倫敦享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Rogero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Cayetano, Jose, Silva.
Spanish: from the personal name Rogero (see Roger ).
Catalan (Rogeró): from a pet form of the personal name Roger .

variants.name: Rieck
meanings: South German: from a pet form of the personal name Ru(o)diger, a compound of Old High German hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + gēr ‘spear, lance’ (see Roger ).
North German: from a short form of a personal name containing the element rīc ‘power(ful)’.
Germanized form of Sorbian Rjek: nickname from Upper Sorbian rjek ‘hero’. Compare Reck .

variants.name: Rogelio
meanings: Spanish; Portuguese (Rogélio): from the personal name Rogelio, Portuguese Rogélio, of ancient Germanic origin (see Roger ).

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Roger  .

variants.name: Rogers
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Roger , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí (see Rorie ).

History: Thomas Rogers (c. 1587–1621), born in London, England, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620. He died during the first winter at Plymouth Colony, but his son Joseph survived and married, and was later joined in MA by his brother John. This name was subsequently brought to North America independently by many different bearers.

variants.name: Rogel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Jose, Jose Luis, Juan, Marcos, Margarita, Wilfredo, Adilia, Alejandro, Ana Gladys, Ana Maria, Anacleto.
Spanish: from the personal name Rogel, an equivalent of French Roger .

Americanized form of Slovenian Rogelj: nickname or topographic name from rogelj ‘horn, point’, figuratively ‘tall young man’, as a topographic name probably denoting someone who lived e.g. on a horn-shaped spur of a hill. The surname in the form Rogel is found in Slovenia, too, where it is a less common variant.

variants.name: Prosser
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Rhosier ‘son of Roger’ (see Roger and Rosser ).

variants.name: Rogerson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Roger + -son.

variants.name: Ritger
meanings: Altered form of German and Dutch Rutger or Rütger, from the personal name Rudiger (see Roger ).

variants.name: Rogge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Bernd, Bernhard, Elke, Hans, Helmut, Wolfgang.
German and Dutch: from a short form of the personal name   Roger  .
North German and Dutch: metonymic occupational name for a grower of rye or a baker of rye bread, from Low German, Dutch rogge ‘rye’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Gentleman John Fitz Roger was born in February 1335, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Aaron John FitzRoger, was 60 and his mother, Sybill Dacerra, was 59. He married Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux in 1370, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 24 February 1386, in London, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.London, Middlesex, Canada West, British: London, Middlesex, Canada-Ouest, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gentleman John Fitz Roger est né en février 1335, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Aaron John FitzRoger, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Sybill Dacerra, avait 59 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux en 1370, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 février 1386, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.London, Middlesex, Canada West, British: London, Middlesex, Canada West, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Gentleman John Fitz Roger im Februar 1335 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Aaron John FitzRoger 60 und seine Mutter Sybill Dacerra 59. Er hat 1370 in London, Middlesex, England Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Februar 1386 im Alter von 51 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gentleman John Fitz Roger è nato il nel febbraio 1335 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Aaron John FitzRoger, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Sybill Dacerra, aveva 59 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux nel 1370, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 febbraio 1386, nel London, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gentleman John Fitz Rogerが1335年2月にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir Aaron John FitzRogerは60歳，母Sybill Dacerraは59歳であった。1370年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでMargaret Elizabeth De Furneauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年2月24日にイギリスロンドンで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.London, Middlesex, Canada West, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 캔아다 웨스트 미들레세스 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Gentleman John Fitz Roger(이)가 1335년 2월 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Aaron John FitzRoger(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybill Dacerra(은)는 59세였다. 그는 1370년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 2월 24일 영국 런던에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gentleman John Fitz Roger nasceu em fevereiro de 1335, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Aaron John FitzRoger, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Sybill Dacerra, tinha 59 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux em 1370, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1386, em London, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.London, Middlesex, Canada West, British: лондон, миддлесекс, канада вест, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gentleman John Fitz Roger родился февраль 1335 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Aaron John FitzRoger было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybill Dacerra, 59. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux в 1370 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 февраля 1386 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret Elizabeth De Furneaux en 1370, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1386, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
